full_text:
‘Caution level’ heat alert issued for 14 districts
March 25, 2026 at
4:20 PM
The Department of Meteorology has issued an advisory for warm weather in the Western, Sabaragamuwa, Southern, North-western provinces and Anuradhapura, Mannar, Vavuniya, Monaragala districts.
Per the advisory, valid for tomorrow (26), the Heat Index, the temperature felt on the human body, is likely to increase up to ‘Caution level’ at some places in 14 districts.
As such, people may experience fatigue with prolonged exposure, while continued activity could result in heat cramps. (Newswire)
